title: Laramus Base Irregulars

The '''Laramus Base Irregulars''', or '''Irregulars''' for short, were a small company of [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] that were led by [[Tagg Pierce]]. Pierce formed the Irregulars after he was rejected from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] for insubordination.

They were often considered to be little more than 'dead men' among other [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] groups due to the fact that they were frequently given extremely dangerous assignments. They had a ninety-six percent turnover rate and a fifty percent casualty rate throughout their history. The Irregulars established a base on [[Laramus]] and attempted to stay out of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. However, the establishment of a Rebel Alliance base on that [[Planet/Legends|world]] attracted the attention of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. This forced the Laramus Base Irregulars to find a new base of operations.

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] the Irregulars joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in order to take on any lingering pockets of Imperial resistance throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They were responsible for the resignation of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Abran Balfour/Legends|Abran Balfour]].
